tasks.prompt:
Half-body portrait of Laozi (Li Er). Appearance: elderly man with long white eyebrows, long white beard, broad forehead, large earlobes, hair in a topknot bun (盘髻). Elderly. Wearing ancient Chinese robes, crossed-collar garment (交领右衽), hair in a topknot or guan (冠). Expression: serene, detached expression, slight enigmatic smile, eyes half-closed in contemplation. Clear recognizable likeness of 老子.

Style: warm beige background (#F7F3ED subtle warm cream), black baimiao (白描) line art, half-body portrait facing forward, single-color fine brushstrokes, minimalist traditional Chinese ink aesthetic, ample negative space, elegant hand-drawn line quality. No shading, no color except the warm beige background.

Half-body portrait of Confucius (Kong Qiu). Appearance: elderly man with flowing beard, kind eyes, broad forehead, hair tied in a bun, traditional scholar's cap (儒冠). Wearing ancient Chinese robes, crossed-collar garment (交领右衽), hair in a topknot or guan (冠). Expression: warm, benevolent expression, gentle eyes, upright dignified posture. Clear recognizable likeness of 孔子.

Half-body portrait of Socrates. Appearance: bald head, broad flat nose, round face, thick beard, stocky build, snub nose, bulging eyes. Clear recognizable likeness of 苏格拉底.
